binary_checks: Did the answer identify the true binding constraint or an acceptable near-equivalent?
Did the answer name at least one real slow variable rather than only symptoms or fast variables?
Did the top intervention act on the binding constraint?
Did the answer avoid at least one known distractor/non-bottleneck action?
Did the answer include at least one plausible early-warning signal?

slow_variable_recall_0_to_2.1: One real slow variable or mixed with symptoms
slow_variable_recall_0_to_2.2: Multiple real slow variables, clearly separated from symptoms

distractor_resistance_0_to_2.2: Stays focused on the real constraint
